classes.name: Wanderer
classes.description: A traveler with no specific allegiance.

classes.name: Beast Master
classes.description: A commander of the wild who uses pets to harass enemies and defend allies.

classes.name: Red Mage
classes.description: Jack-of-all-trades mage with access to both offensive and defensive spells.

classes.name: Paladin
classes.description: A hybrid tank/support, capable of shielding allies while smiting enemies.

classes.name: Cleric
classes.description: A divine caster focused on healing, protection, and purging evil.

classes.name: Bard
classes.description: A support-oriented musician who uses melodies to buff allies and debuff enemies.

classes.name: Barbarian
classes.description: A force of raw, chaotic power, focused on high-damage melee combat and disruptive battlefield presence.

classes.name: Assassin
classes.description: A stealth specialist who excels at positioning and lethal backstabs.

bonuses.passive: First attack in combat deals 20% more damage.

classes.name: Rogue
classes.description: A versatile scoundrel skilled in toxins, traps, and stealth.

classes.name: Shadow Dancer
classes.description: A prestige rogue who weaves through the battlefield.

classes.name: Elementalist
classes.description: A mage who chains elemental spells for devastating combos.

bonuses.passive: Elemental status effects last 1 extra turn.

classes.name: Knight
classes.description: A heavily armored warrior with defensive magic and strong melee capabilities.

classes.name: Warrior
classes.description: A master of all weapons who controls the flow of melee combat.

classes.name: Alchemist
classes.description: A versatile manipulator of matter who thrives on modifying the battlefield through transmutation.

classes.name: Scout
classes.description: Mobile, stealthy melee fighter specializing in hit-and-run tactics.

classes.name: Ranger
classes.description: Tactical, nature-bound archer/trapper who mixes long-range combat with terrain bonuses.

classes.name: Berserker
classes.description: An offensive powerhouse that thrives in the chaos of melee combat.

classes.name: Druid
classes.description: A battlefield manipulator, capable of summoning storms and altering visibility.

classes.name: Geomancer
classes.description: Manipulates the battlefield by using terrain features as sources of power.

classes.name: Warlock
classes.description: A practitioner of forbidden arts who drains life and spreads decay.

bonuses.passive: Dark spells heal you for 5% of damage dealt.

classes.name: Dragoon
classes.description: A highly mobile warrior who excels in vertical movement and multi-target attacks.

classes.name: Monk
classes.description: Uses stances to alter their combat style, allowing them to be aggressive or defensive.

bonuses.passive: Unarmed attacks generate 1 Chi on critical hits.

classes.name: Necromancer
classes.description: Controls the dead, using reanimated corpses to fight alongside them.

classes.name: Black Mage
classes.description: The epitome of raw magical destruction, specializing in high-damage AoE.

bonuses.passive: Spells deal 20% more damage but cost 20% more resource.

classes.name: Chemist
classes.description: A battlefield support expert using potions for healing, buffs, and explosives.

bonuses.passive: Potions have double range and effect radius.

classes.name: Dancer
classes.description: A rhythmic combatant who combines offensive buffs with disruptive effects.

bonuses.passive: Evasion increases by 5% for each active buff.

classes.name: Death Knight
classes.description: A hybrid tank and dark caster who drains life to sustain in combat.

bonuses.passive: Healing from Lifesteal effects increased by 25%.

classes.name: Defiler
classes.description: A master of curses and afflictions who wins through attrition.

bonuses.passive: Status effect duration increased by 1 round.

classes.name: Engineer
classes.description: A mid-range battlefield manipulator focused on building deployables.

classes.name: Gambler
classes.description: Thrives on risk and reward, using dice rolls to create unexpected advantages.

classes.name: Gold Mage
classes.description: Manipulates currency and resources as a source of power.

classes.name: Gunner
classes.description: A pure ranged damage dealer using different shot types.

classes.name: Hunter
classes.description: A hybrid combatant excelling in tracking, ranged combat, and taming beasts.

classes.name: Illusionist
classes.description: Deceives enemies by creating clones and distorting movement.

classes.name: Machinist
classes.description: Excels at long-term battlefield management through autonomous drones.

classes.name: Mage
classes.description: The standard spellcaster, focused on raw elemental power.

classes.name: Magician
classes.description: A control-based caster specializing in disruption and telekinesis.

classes.name: Mime
classes.description: Can duplicate the abilities of both allies and enemies.

classes.name: Ninja
classes.description: A fast-moving skirmisher specializing in precision strikes and agility.

classes.name: Priest
classes.description: The strongest raw healer, using divine magic to restore HP.

classes.name: Puppet Master
classes.description: Summons controllable constructs that follow commands.

classes.name: Samurai
classes.description: Precision-based melee warrior with spirit-infused sword techniques.

classes.name: Shaman
classes.description: Casts spells that evolve over time and summons ancestral spirits.

classes.name: Silver Mage
classes.description: A support-oriented caster enhancing time and light.

classes.name: Soldier
classes.description: Tactically trained infantry excelling at weapon adaptability.

classes.name: Sorcerer
classes.description: Casts unrefined, chaotic spells with unpredictable effects.

bonuses.passive: Spells have 10% chance to double cast.

classes.name: Soul Weaver
classes.description: Drains life from allies and enemies to fuel devastating spells.

classes.name: Summoner
classes.description: Controls powerful but costly legendary creatures.

classes.name: Temporalist
classes.description: A master of space and time, manipulating the battlefield with walls and portals.

classes.name: Thief
classes.description: A scoundrel who steals from foes and uses wealth as a weapon.

classes.name: Twin
classes.description: Two souls bound as one, capable of double casting and striking.

bonuses.passive: 10% chance to double cast spells or attacks.

classes.name: Grey Mage
classes.description: A balancer of forces who walks the line between Light and Dark.

bonuses.passive: Spells cost 10% less if alternating Light/Dark.

classes.name: Viking
classes.description: A raider from the sea who excels with axes and shields.

bonuses.passive: Gain 5% damage reduction when wielding a shield.

classes.name: Warden
classes.description: A guardian of the wilds who protects nature with heavy armor.

bonuses.passive: Regenerate HP while in natural terrain.

classes.name: White Mage
classes.description: A pure healer dedicated to restoration and protection.

classes.name: Witch
classes.description: A caster who brews potions and casts hexes.
